args.name: pk
args.desc: public key of the generated vrf keypair

args.name: heads
args.desc: does user think the user will be heads?

returns.desc: uint64 the commitmentRound when participant can complete the game

methods.name: completeGame
methods.desc: Completes a game and refunds the user their box storage fees

args.name: proof
args.desc: the VRF proof signed by the participant's private key (using the block seed at commitmentRound)

returns.desc: boolean if the user won or not

methods.name: cancelGame
methods.desc: Cancels a game and refunds the user their box storage fees
